customAttributes.description:
Collect All Four World Championship Decks
Relive the excitement of the 1997 World Championships with these four commemorative decks.

Jakub Slemr, World Champion—A fast, black creature deck that splashes in spells from all five colors.
Janosch Kuhn, Finalist—A red, white, and blue deck built for the long game.
Paul McCabe, Semifinalist—A red-blue attacking deck that uses a number of efficient creatures and spells.
Svend Geertsen, Semifinalist—An extremely fast mono-green deck that uses a horde of creatures and very few other spells.
